LanguageData.HAR_OT_Hediff_d.label: Catalysis
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Hediff_d.description:
A state caused by suffering one of an Outerm's wicked strikes.

An invisible energy has been driven into the body, leaving both mind and flesh unstable.
No one understands exactly how it works; all it brings is mounting discomfort and fear.

This state naturally fades after several hours.
